notes: H003: Input resize 336→224px before vision encoder. No training change — purely inference-time image downscale. Mac eval uses fp16 HF proxy with PIL resize to 224px. iPhone: VLMHarness will resize sample images to 224px via UIImage. Expected: TTFT −30%, Mem −20% from fewer image tokens. Risk: CLIP −1.5 if model trained at 336px fixed resolution.
instructions: Deploy the model to the target device and run the VLMHarness measurement protocol (5 warm-up + 5 measured runs). Export the MetricsReport JSON and call ExperimentRunner.import_iphone_results(experiment_id, path).
